PFS Rate (%) | Overall | Control.value: Median bPFS: 12.9 mo (95% CI, 11.9–17.7); Median rPFS: 15.3 mo (95% CI, 12.4–19.8).

source.verbatim_quote: The bPFS was significantly longer for patients randomized in the ADT plus D arm in the overall population at 22.9 mo (95% CI, 19.5–28.4) versus 12.9 mo (95% CI, 11.9–17.7) ... Similarly, rPFS was significantly longer for patients randomized in the ADT plus D arm in the overall population at 22.9 mo (95% CI, 20.5–31.4) versus 15.3 mo (95% CI, 12.4–19.8)

attribution.verbatim_quote: The bPFS was significantly longer for patients randomized in the ADT plus D arm in the overall population at 22.9 mo (95% CI, 19.5–28.4) versus 12.9 mo (95% CI, 11.9–17.7) ... Similarly, rPFS was significantly longer for patients randomized in the ADT plus D arm in the overall population at 22.9 mo (95% CI, 20.5–31.4) versus 15.3 mo (95% CI, 12.4–19.8)

PFS Rate (%) | Overall | Treatment.value: bPFS: 22.9 mo (95% CI, 19.5-28.4); rPFS: 22.9 mo (95% CI, 20.5-31.4). Hazard ratio for ADT plus D vs ADT alone: bPFS 0.67 (95% CI, 0.54–0.84); rPFS 0.69 (95% CI, 0.55–0.87).

source.verbatim_quote: The bPFS was significantly longer for patients randomized in the ADT plus D arm in the overall population at 22.9 mo (95% CI, 19.5–28.4) ... Similarly, rPFS was significantly longer for patients randomized in the ADT plus D arm in the overall population at 22.9 mo (95% CI, 20.5–31.4) ... (HR: 0.67 [95% CI, 0.54–0.84]; p < 0.001) ... (HR: 0.69 [95% CI, 0.55–0.87]; p = 0.002)

attribution.verbatim_quote: The bPFS was significantly longer for patients randomized in the ADT plus D arm in the overall population at 22.9 mo (95% CI, 19.5–28.4) ... Similarly, rPFS was significantly longer for patients randomized in the ADT plus D arm in the overall population at 22.9 mo (95% CI, 20.5–31.4) ... (HR: 0.67 [95% CI, 0.54–0.84]; p < 0.001) ... (HR: 0.69 [95% CI, 0.55–0.87]; p = 0.002)

Type of Therapy.value: ADT plus Docetaxel (75 mg/m² for 21 days, up to nine cycles) or ADT alone (orchiectomy or luteinizing hormone-releasing hormone agonists, alone or combined with nonsteroidal androgen receptor inhibito

source.verbatim_quote: Eligible patients were randomized in a 1:1 ratio to ADT plus D (75 mg/m² for 21 d, up to nine cycles) or ADT alone. ADT consisted of orchiectomy or luteinizing hormone-releasing hormone agonists, alone or combined with nonsteroidal androgen receptor inhibitors.

attribution.verbatim_quote: Eligible patients were randomized in a 1:1 ratio to ADT plus D (75 mg/m² for 21 d, up to nine cycles) or ADT alone. ADT consisted of orchiectomy or luteinizing hormone-releasing hormone agonists, alone or combined with nonsteroidal androgen receptor inhibitors.
